title: Unit 5 Trashketball
subtitle: Sections 5.1-5.3 Non-Honors Review
notes: This question bank mirrors the playable HTML board. All solving questions use exact unit-circle values.

categories.name: Simplifying Trig Expressions with Fundamental ID's

questions.clue: Simplify: sin x * csc x
Simplify: (sin x * cos x) / tan x
Simplify: 1 / (1 + cot^2 x)
Simplify: csc x - cos x cot x
Rewrite without a fraction: sin^2 x / (1 + cos x)
Verify: (sec^2 theta - 1) / sec^2 theta = sin^2 theta
questions.answer: Use sec^2 theta - 1 = tan^2 theta, then rewrite in sine and cosine.

questions.clue: Verify: tan x + cot x = sec x csc x
questions.answer: Convert to sine and cosine, combine over a common denominator, and use sin^2 x + cos^2 x = 1.

questions.clue: Verify: (1 + sin x) / cos x = cos x / (1 - sin x)
questions.answer: Start on the right and multiply by (1 + sin x) / (1 + sin x).

questions.clue: Verify: cot^2 theta / (1 + csc theta) = (1 - sin theta) / sin theta
questions.answer: Replace cot^2 theta with csc^2 theta - 1, factor, cancel, and rewrite csc theta.

questions.clue: Verify: sin^3 x cos^4 x = (cos^4 x - cos^6 x) sin x
questions.answer: Factor the right side as cos^4 x (1 - cos^2 x) sin x and use 1 - cos^2 x = sin^2 x.

questions.clue: Solve on [0, 2pi): sin x = 1/2
Solve on [0, 2pi): cos x = -sqrt(2)/2
Solve on [0, 2pi): 2cos^2 x - 1 = 0
Find all solutions: sec beta csc beta = 2 csc beta
Find all solutions: cot x cos^2 x = 2 cot x

categories.name: Solving Trig Equations with Quadratic Forms

questions.clue: Solve on [0, 2pi): 2sin^2 theta + sin theta - 1 = 0
Solve on [0, 2pi): 2sin^2 x - 5sin x + 2 = 0
Solve on [0, 2pi): 2cos^2 theta - 7cos theta + 3 = 0
Solve on [0, 2pi): 2cos^2 x + cos x - 1 = 0
Solve on [0, 2pi): tan^2 theta - 1 = 0

categories.name: Solving Trig Equations with Quadratics / Square Roots / Fundamental ID's

questions.clue: Find all solutions: sin^2 x + cos x = -1
Find all solutions: 2sin^2 x + 3cos x - 3 = 0
Solve on [0, 2pi): 2cos^2 x - 5sin x + 1 = 0
Solve on [0, 2pi): sqrt(1 + sin x) = cos x
Solve on [0, 2pi): cos x + 1 = sin x

final_shot.clue: A student squares cos x + 1 = sin x and gets x = pi/2, pi, 3pi/2. Which values survive in the original equation?
final_shot.answer: x = pi/2 and pi are valid. x = 3pi/2 is extraneous.
